AboutPage.title: About Us
AboutPage.section1Body:
Founded with a passion for great web experiences, we set out to build the best possible foundation for marketing sites.

Our team combines deep expertise in design systems, performance optimization, and developer experience to create a starter that teams love to use.
AboutPage.section2Body:
We empower marketing teams to build beautiful, high-performance websites without compromising on developer experience or accessibility.

Our platform combines the best of modern web technologies with an intuitive component architecture that anyone on the team can contribute to.

Hero.heading: Build Better Marketing Sites
Hero.subtitle: A production-grade Next.js starter with i18n, theming, and block-based composable pages.

FeatureGrid.heading: Everything You Need
FeatureGrid.description: Production-grade features to build and scale your marketing site.

lightning.heading: Lightning Fast
lightning.description: Built on Next.js for optimal performance with automatic code splitting and edge caching.

secure.heading: Secure by Default
secure.description: Enterprise-grade security with CSP headers, proper CORS configuration, and input validation.

globe.heading: International Ready
globe.description: Full i18n support with next-intl for routing, translations, and locale detection out of the box.

analytics.heading: Analytics Ready
analytics.description: Event tracking infrastructure built in. Drop in your analytics provider with zero friction.

team.heading: Team Friendly
team.description: Consistent code patterns, co-located files, and strong conventions make collaboration easy.

notifications.heading: Notification System
notifications.description: Toast notifications and banner alerts with action callbacks and auto-dismiss timing.

CTA.heading: Ready to Get Started?
CTA.description: Join thousands of teams building better marketing sites with our starter template.

home.title: Marketing Starter
home.description: A production-grade Next.js marketing site template.
